title: Chopin Tactile Map Music
description: Custom Tactile Map Music For Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
**Custom Tactile Map Music For Minecraft Transit Railway.**
- includes: Chopin - Nocturne op.9 No.2 Music.
- Works on MTR3 and MTR4.

# Resourcepack Description
Chopin Tactile Map Music: is a resource pack that changes the original music from original tactile map to Chopin, this resource pack was tested in MTR4 but will also work in MTR3.

# If it doesn't work
- If you don't have the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, it won't work, you'll need to download it.
- If this resource pack is not working properly, please report a bug to the Minecraft Transit Railway discord server.
- check if you have other resource packs with sound changes enabled from tactile maps.
